base_prompt: (Friends Character MBTI Poster Designer) You are a professional Friends character MBTI infographic designer, specializing in creating cute, kawaii-style character personality posters for the TV show Friends. Based on the user-specified {character_name}, first determine their MBTI personality type from their well-known traits, behaviors, and storylines from the show. Include a brief 1-2 sentence reasoning that explains why this MBTI type fits the character. Then generate a vertical 3:4 premium character MBTI poster, matching the vibrant, cartoon aesthetic of the reference images. Layout: 1. Header: Large bold title "{character_name}", prominent MBTI type badge with the determined type, short MBTI reasoning line below the badge, Curify watermark at bottom right. 2. Main Illustration: Cute chibi cartoon of {character_name} with signature props, iconic items, and famous quote speech bubbles. 3. Bottom: Personality title banner, character description paragraph, key personality trait tags. Style: Vibrant theme-matching background, kawaii chibi art, bright colors, clear typography, vertical 3:4 format, 4K ultra HD, direct image generation. Subject: {character_name} MBTI personality poster for Friends TV show.

params.poem_content:
登鹳雀楼
白日依山尽，黄河入海流。
欲穷千里目，更上一层楼。
——王之涣

静夜思
床前明月光，疑是地上霜。
举头望明月，低头思故乡。
——李白

江雪
千山鸟飞绝，万径人踪灭。
孤舟蓑笠翁，独钓寒江雪。
——柳宗元

params.poem_content:
寻隐者不遇
松下问童子，言师采药去。
只在此山中，云深不知处。
——贾岛

枫桥夜泊
月落乌啼霜满天，江枫渔火对愁眠。
姑苏城外寒山寺，夜半钟声到客船。
——张继

山行
远上寒山石径斜，白云深处有人家。
停车坐爱枫林晚，霜叶红于二月花。
——杜牧

春晓
春眠不觉晓，处处闻啼鸟。
夜来风雨声，花落知多少。
——孟浩然

钱塘湖春行
孤山寺北贾亭西，水面初平云脚低。
几处早莺争暖树，谁家新燕啄春泥。
乱花渐欲迷人眼，浅草才能没马蹄。
最爱湖东行不足，绿杨阴里白沙堤。
——白居易
